_comment: Sample data in the standardized Stage 7 shape. Used for UI development and the /demo route, before/independent of the live Supabase connection. One account per signal. No real client data here. All companies and contacts are fictional.

signals.title: NM Methane Waste Rule enforcement notice
signals.summary: Unresolved alleged violations of the state Methane Waste Rule, set for a merits hearing. State regulation requires 98% gas capture by Dec 31, 2026, with permit suspension as the non-compliance penalty.
signals.signal_intelligence: Open enforcement docket naming the operator. Capture-rule citation is explicit, not generic ESG language. Usable as a template for similar operators trailing the deadline.
signals.suggested_next_step: Pull the operator's monthly waste report. Confirm single vs multi-state footprint. Approach EHS lead with a zero-vent pneumatic brief tied to the capture deadline.
signals.outreach_angle: Lead with the Dec 31 98% capture deadline and the permit-suspension penalty. Position as the fastest documented path to compliance.
signals.false_positive_filter: Policy news with no named operator; old dockets past hearing date.

signals.title: New 6-well horizontal program filing
signals.summary: New compulsory pooling filing for a 6-well horizontal program in an active Permian county. Operator re-confirmed active with a fresh program after a prior 12-well filing earlier in the year.
signals.signal_intelligence: Named, dated asset filing. Scale and location are specific enough to anchor outreach. Confidence reset on re-detection in the latest docket.
signals.suggested_next_step: Pull the case files. Approach the sustainability lead with a zero-vent brief tied to the capture deadline. Cross-reference permits in adjacent states to size the account.
signals.outreach_angle: Tie the new 6-well pad to zero-vent pneumatics ahead of the 98% capture rule. Reference the asset by name.
signals.false_positive_filter: Deadline-extension cases with no new pad; permits already drilled.

signals.title: Public net-zero pledge with 2027 interim target
signals.summary: Issued a public decarbonization commitment naming a 2027 interim methane-intensity target ahead of a 2035 net-zero goal. The release names specific gathering systems in scope.
signals.signal_intelligence: Commitment is dated and quantified, not aspirational. Named assets make it actionable rather than a generic ESG statement.
signals.suggested_next_step: Map the named gathering systems to current venting sources. Brief the sustainability office on a measurement-to-abatement path that hits the 2027 interim number.
signals.outreach_angle: Anchor on the 2027 interim target they have already made public. Offer the documented path to hit it on the named systems.
signals.false_positive_filter: Net-zero language with no date or no named assets; re-announcements of old pledges.

signals.title: New Director of Emissions Management role posted
signals.summary: Posted a newly created Director of Emissions Management position citing a build-out of leak detection and repair (LDAR) and pneumatic retrofit programs across Bakken assets.
signals.signal_intelligence: A net-new role tied explicitly to an emissions program signals budget and intent forming now, before tooling is locked in.
signals.suggested_next_step: Reach the hiring VP and the new director once seated. Offer a program template so your solution is the default in their first 90-day plan.
signals.outreach_angle: Get in before the new director picks tooling. Bring a 90-day LDAR-plus-pneumatic plan they can adopt on day one.
signals.false_positive_filter: Generic EHS reqs with no program language; backfills of existing roles.

signals.title: Open grid-modernization RFP
signals.summary: Issued an open RFP for grid-modernization and capacity work with a fixed August close date and named technical line items.
signals.signal_intelligence: Dated, open procurement with named scope. Highest-intent signal type: an active buying process, not a leading indicator.
signals.suggested_next_step: Confirm bidder eligibility. Map capabilities to the RFP's named line items. Engage the procurement lead before close.
signals.outreach_angle: Map your solution to the named RFP line items before the Aug 15 close. Get on the bidder list now.
signals.false_positive_filter: Press releases announcing intent with no procurement action; RFPs already closed.

signals.title: Consent decree on flaring exceedances
signals.summary: Entered a consent decree resolving repeated flaring-volume exceedances, with staged compliance milestones beginning within the quarter and third-party verification required.
signals.signal_intelligence: A consent decree is a hard, dated obligation with penalties for slippage. Third-party verification language signals budget for measurement and abatement.
signals.suggested_next_step: Map the decree milestones to current flaring sources. Approach compliance and operations jointly with a measurement-plus-abatement plan that clears the first milestone.
signals.outreach_angle: Lead with the first dated milestone in the decree and the verification requirement. Offer the lowest-risk path to clear it on time.
signals.false_positive_filter: Settlements with no operational milestones; decrees already fully satisfied.

signals.title: Compression station expansion permit
signals.summary: Filed an air permit for a compression station expansion, adding units that change the facility's pneumatic and venting profile during construction next quarter.
signals.signal_intelligence: A dated, named infrastructure expansion creates a fresh design window where zero-vent equipment can be specified before build.
signals.suggested_next_step: Reach facilities engineering during design, not after. Offer a zero-vent specification for the new compression units tied to the permit scope.
signals.outreach_angle: Get the zero-vent spec into the design before the Q4 build. Reference the permit and the added units by name.
signals.false_positive_filter: Renewal permits with no new equipment; filings later withdrawn.

signals.title: Methane-intensity disclosure tied to financing
signals.summary: Disclosed a methane-intensity target embedded in a sustainability-linked financing facility, with the first reporting covenant due next quarter and a pricing step-up if missed.
signals.signal_intelligence: Financing-linked targets carry real money consequences, which moves them from ESG optics to operational priority with executive attention.
signals.suggested_next_step: Brief the CFO office and sustainability lead on measurement that satisfies the covenant. Tie abatement to avoiding the pricing step-up.
signals.outreach_angle: Connect the covenant and the pricing step-up to a measurement-and-abatement plan that protects their financing terms.
signals.false_positive_filter: Voluntary disclosures with no financial linkage; targets with no near-term reporting date.

signals.title: Substation automation RFP, two-stage bid
signals.summary: Issued a two-stage RFP for substation automation and monitoring, with stage-one technical responses due in early September and a shortlist to follow.
signals.signal_intelligence: Two-stage procurement with a near technical deadline favors vendors who engage early to shape stage-two requirements.
signals.suggested_next_step: Submit a strong stage-one technical response and request a clarification call to influence the shortlist criteria before stage two.
signals.outreach_angle: Shape the stage-two criteria now by leading stage one. Map directly to the named automation scope.
signals.false_positive_filter: Single-stage RFQs already awarded; information requests with no bid path.

signals.title: Head of Asset Performance hire announced
signals.summary: Announced a Head of Asset Performance hire whose stated mandate includes standing up fleet-wide monitoring and analytics for a growing renewables portfolio.
signals.signal_intelligence: A named executive with a monitoring mandate is a buying-center forming around exactly the category being sold, with a fresh budget cycle.
signals.suggested_next_step: Congratulate and engage the new head with a portfolio monitoring blueprint. Offer a pilot scoped to their first reporting milestone.
signals.outreach_angle: Bring a fleet-wide monitoring blueprint to the new head before they build it in-house. Offer a fast pilot.
signals.false_positive_filter: Hires with no stated monitoring mandate; promotions within unrelated functions.
